prompts.name: Code Review
prompts.description: Review pasted code with configurable focus and strictness
prompts.content:
You are a senior engineer reviewing code.

Language/stack: <var name="language" type="text" value="" label="Language or stack" placeholder="e.g. Rust, React" />

Focus: <var name="focus" type="option" options="correctness,security,performance,readability,all" value="all" label="Review focus" />

Severity: <var name="severity" type="option" options="nitpick,normal,strict" value="normal" label="How strict" />

Code:
<var name="code" type="multiline" value="" label="Code to review" placeholder="Paste code or diff" />

Review for bugs, edge cases, and maintainability. For each issue: location, problem, suggested fix. Skip praise unless it teaches something. Match the severity level.

prompts.name: Explain Code
prompts.description: Explain what code does for a chosen audience and depth
prompts.content:
Explain the following code.

Audience: <var name="audience" type="option" options="junior dev,peer,non-technical" value="peer" label="Audience" />

Depth: <var name="depth" type="option" options="tldr,standard,deep dive" value="standard" label="Depth" />

Code:
<var name="code" type="multiline" value="" label="Code" placeholder="Paste code" />

Cover purpose, data flow, and non-obvious behavior. Use examples where helpful.

prompts.name: Debug Error
prompts.description: Diagnose errors from logs or stack traces and suggest fixes
prompts.content:
Help me debug this issue.

Environment: <var name="environment" type="text" value="" label="Environment" placeholder="OS, runtime, versions" />

Error or logs:
<var name="error_or_logs" type="multiline" value="" label="Error or logs" placeholder="Paste stack trace or logs" />

What I tried:
<var name="what_i_tried" type="multiline" value="" label="What I tried" placeholder="Steps already taken" />

Constraints: <var name="constraints" type="text" value="minimal diff" label="Constraints" placeholder="e.g. no new deps" />

Identify root cause, explain why it happens, and propose a concrete fix. List verification steps.

prompts.name: Minimal Change
prompts.description: Request a focused change with explicit constraints for coding agents
prompts.content:
Make a minimal, focused change.

Goal: <var name="goal" type="text" value="" label="Goal" placeholder="What should change" />

Context:
<var name="context" type="multiline" value="" label="Context" placeholder="Relevant code, files, or behavior" />

Must not:
<var name="must_not" type="multiline" value="" label="Must not" placeholder="Out of scope or forbidden changes" />

Test after: <var name="test_after" type="option" options="yes,no,suggest tests" value="yes" label="Testing" />

Prefer the smallest correct diff. Explain trade-offs only if necessary.

prompts.name: Write Tests
prompts.description: Generate tests for pasted code with framework and coverage options
prompts.content:
Write tests for the following code.

Framework: <var name="framework" type="text" value="" label="Test framework" placeholder="e.g. vitest, pytest" />

Coverage: <var name="coverage" type="option" options="happy path,edge cases,full" value="edge cases" label="Coverage" />

Style: <var name="style" type="option" options="unit,integration,property-based" value="unit" label="Test style" />

Code:
<var name="code" type="multiline" value="" label="Code under test" placeholder="Paste implementation" />

Include clear test names and assertions. Cover edge cases per the coverage setting.

prompts.name: Refactor
prompts.description: Refactor code toward a stated goal with constraints
prompts.content:
Refactor the following code.

Goal: <var name="goal" type="option" options="simplify,extract,rename,performance,types" value="simplify" label="Refactor goal" />

Constraints: <var name="constraints" type="text" value="preserve behavior" label="Constraints" placeholder="e.g. no API changes" />

Code:
<var name="code" type="multiline" value="" label="Code" placeholder="Paste code to refactor" />

Preserve observable behavior unless stated otherwise. Show the refactored code and briefly note what improved.

prompts.name: Agent System Prompt
prompts.description: Reusable base persona and rules for a coding agent
prompts.content:
You are an AI coding agent with the following role and rules.

Role: <var name="role" type="text" value="senior software engineer" label="Role" />

Project context:
<var name="project_context" type="multiline" value="" label="Project context" placeholder="Stack, architecture, conventions" />

Coding standards:
<var name="coding_standards" type="multiline" value="" label="Coding standards" placeholder="Style, patterns, forbidden practices" />

Output format: <var name="output_format" type="option" options="prose,numbered steps,patch-only,markdown report" value="numbered steps" label="Output format" />

Verbosity: <var name="verbosity" type="option" options="concise,balanced,thorough" value="balanced" label="Verbosity" />

Follow these rules throughout the session. Ask clarifying questions only when blocked.

prompts.name: Explore Codebase
prompts.description: Structured task for an agent to find how something works
prompts.content:
Explore the codebase and answer this question.

Question: <var name="question" type="text" value="" label="Question" placeholder="What do you need to find?" />

Search scope: <var name="search_scope" type="text" value="" label="Search scope" placeholder="Dirs, modules, or files to prioritize" />

Repo context:
<var name="repo_context" type="multiline" value="" label="Repo context" placeholder="README excerpt, tree, or notes" />

Answer format: <var name="answer_format" type="option" options="summary,file references,step-by-step trace" value="file references" label="Answer format" />

Trace the flow from entry point to outcome. Cite specific files and symbols.

prompts.name: Implement Feature
prompts.description: Structured feature request with acceptance criteria for agents
prompts.content:
Implement the following feature.

Feature: <var name="feature" type="text" value="" label="Feature" placeholder="One-line summary" />

Acceptance criteria:
<var name="acceptance_criteria" type="multiline" value="" label="Acceptance criteria" placeholder="Bullet list of done conditions" />

Files or areas: <var name="files_or_areas" type="text" value="" label="Files or areas" placeholder="Where to work" />

Out of scope:
<var name="out_of_scope" type="multiline" value="" label="Out of scope" placeholder="What not to change" />

Verify with: <var name="verify_with" type="text" value="tests and manual check" label="Verification" />

Plan briefly, then implement. Run or suggest tests before finishing.

prompts.name: Subtask Handoff
prompts.description: Hand off a subtask to a sub-agent or fresh chat with context
prompts.content:
You are taking over a subtask from a larger effort.

Parent goal: <var name="parent_goal" type="text" value="" label="Parent goal" />

This subtask: <var name="this_subtask" type="text" value="" label="This subtask" />

Done when:
<var name="done_when" type="multiline" value="" label="Done when" placeholder="Completion criteria" />

Context to carry:
<var name="context_to_carry" type="multiline" value="" label="Context to carry" placeholder="Decisions, files, constraints" />

Blockers:
<var name="blockers" type="multiline" value="" label="Blockers" placeholder="Known risks or dependencies" />

Complete only this subtask. Report what changed and what remains.

prompts.name: PR Description
prompts.description: Generate a pull request description from changes and test plan
prompts.content:
Write a pull request description.

Summary: <var name="summary" type="text" value="" label="Summary" placeholder="One-line summary" />

Changes:
<var name="changes" type="multiline" value="" label="Changes" placeholder="What changed and why" />

Test plan:
<var name="test_plan" type="multiline" value="" label="Test plan" placeholder="How this was verified" />

Breaking changes: <var name="breaking" type="option" options="none,yes,maybe" value="none" label="Breaking changes" />

Use markdown with Summary, Changes, and Test plan sections. Be concise.

prompts.name: Commit Message
prompts.description: Write a commit message from a diff summary or change list
prompts.content:
Write a commit message for these changes.

Convention: <var name="convention" type="option" options="conventional commits,plain,semantic" value="conventional commits" label="Convention" />

Scope: <var name="scope" type="text" value="" label="Scope" placeholder="Optional scope, e.g. api" />

Diff or summary:
<var name="diff_or_summary" type="multiline" value="" label="Diff or summary" placeholder="Paste diff or bullet list" />

Subject line max 72 chars. Include body only if it adds context.

prompts.name: Bug Report
prompts.description: Structured bug report or issue template
prompts.content:
Write a bug report.

Title: <var name="title" type="text" value="" label="Title" />

Steps to reproduce:
<var name="steps" type="multiline" value="" label="Steps to reproduce" />

Expected: <var name="expected" type="text" value="" label="Expected behavior" />

Actual: <var name="actual" type="text" value="" label="Actual behavior" />

Environment: <var name="environment" type="text" value="" label="Environment" placeholder="OS, browser, version" />

Use clear markdown sections. Include reproduction steps a stranger can follow.

prompts.name: Status Update
prompts.description: Team or stakeholder status update from bullet notes
prompts.content:
Write a status update.

Audience: <var name="audience" type="option" options="team,manager,client" value="team" label="Audience" />

Period: <var name="period" type="text" value="this week" label="Period" />

Done:
<var name="done" type="multiline" value="" label="Done" placeholder="Completed items" />

Blocked:
<var name="blocked" type="multiline" value="" label="Blocked" placeholder="Blockers or risks" />

Next:
<var name="next" type="multiline" value="" label="Next" placeholder="Upcoming work" />

Match tone to audience. Lead with outcomes, not activity.

prompts.name: Draft from Brief
prompts.description: Turn bullet notes into polished prose
prompts.content:
Draft prose from the following brief.

Topic: <var name="topic" type="text" value="" label="Topic" />

Key points:
<var name="key_points" type="multiline" value="" label="Key points" placeholder="Bullets or rough notes" />

Audience: <var name="audience" type="option" options="general,technical,executive,customer" value="general" label="Audience" />

Tone: <var name="tone" type="option" options="professional,friendly,persuasive,neutral" value="professional" label="Tone" />

Length: <var name="length" type="option" options="short,medium,long" value="medium" label="Length" />

Format: <var name="format" type="option" options="paragraph,bullets,memo,blog section" value="paragraph" label="Format" />

Write clear, well-structured copy. Do not invent facts beyond the brief.

prompts.name: Rewrite for Tone
prompts.description: Rewrite draft text for a target tone without changing meaning
prompts.content:
Rewrite the following draft.

Target tone: <var name="target_tone" type="option" options="clearer,more formal,more casual,more concise,more engaging" value="clearer" label="Target tone" />

Preserve: <var name="preserve" type="text" value="meaning and technical terms" label="Preserve" />

Draft:
<var name="draft" type="multiline" value="" label="Draft" placeholder="Paste text to rewrite" />

Keep the same facts and intent. Output only the rewritten text unless asked otherwise.

prompts.name: Email
prompts.description: Draft a professional email from purpose and bullet points
prompts.content:
Draft an email.

Purpose: <var name="purpose" type="text" value="" label="Purpose" />

Recipient context: <var name="recipient_context" type="text" value="" label="Recipient context" placeholder="Who they are, relationship" />

Must include:
<var name="must_include" type="multiline" value="" label="Must include" placeholder="Points to cover" />

Tone: <var name="tone" type="option" options="formal,friendly,urgent,apologetic" value="friendly" label="Tone" />

Length: <var name="length" type="option" options="brief,standard" value="brief" label="Length" />

Include subject line and body. No filler.

prompts.name: Social Post
prompts.description: Draft a social media post for a chosen platform
prompts.content:
Draft a social media post.

Message:
<var name="message" type="multiline" value="" label="Message" placeholder="Core idea or bullets" />

Platform: <var name="platform" type="option" options="LinkedIn,X/Twitter,Mastodon,generic" value="LinkedIn" label="Platform" />

Include CTA: <var name="include_cta" type="option" options="yes,no" value="no" label="Include call to action" />

Hashtags: <var name="hashtags" type="option" options="none,few,suggest" value="few" label="Hashtags" />

Match platform norms for length and tone. Output only the post.

prompts.name: Image Prompt Builder
prompts.description: Build a polished image-generation prompt from subject and style options
prompts.content:
Build an image-generation prompt.

Subject:
<var name="subject" type="multiline" value="" label="Subject" placeholder="What to depict" />

Style: <var name="style" type="option" options="photorealistic,digital illustration,watercolor,3D render,anime,pixel art,flat vector" value="photorealistic" label="Style" />

Mood: <var name="mood" type="text" value="" label="Mood" placeholder="e.g. moody, cinematic" />

Composition: <var name="composition" type="text" value="" label="Composition" placeholder="e.g. wide shot, rule of thirds" />

Lighting: <var name="lighting" type="option" options="natural,studio,golden hour,neon,dramatic,soft" value="natural" label="Lighting" />

Aspect ratio: <var name="aspect_ratio" type="option" options="1:1,16:9,9:16,4:3,3:2" value="16:9" label="Aspect ratio" />

Avoid:
<var name="negative" type="multiline" value="" label="Avoid" placeholder="Optional: what to exclude" />

Output a single polished image prompt. No preamble. Include style, composition, lighting, and quality cues. If avoid is provided, append as "Avoid: …".

prompts.name: App Icon / Logo
prompts.description: Image prompt for app icon or logo concepts
prompts.content:
Create an image-generation prompt for an app icon or logo.

App or brand: <var name="app_or_brand" type="text" value="" label="App or brand" />

Concept:
<var name="concept" type="multiline" value="" label="Concept" placeholder="Visual idea or metaphor" />

Style: <var name="style" type="option" options="minimal flat,glyph,skeuomorphic,line art,playful" value="minimal flat" label="Style" />

Colors: <var name="colors" type="text" value="" label="Colors" placeholder="Palette or brand colors" />

Background: <var name="background" type="option" options="transparent,solid,gradient" value="transparent" label="Background" />

Output one concise prompt suitable for icon generators. Square composition, readable at small sizes.

prompts.name: UI Mockup Scene
prompts.description: Image prompt for a UI mockup or screen design
prompts.content:
Create an image-generation prompt for a UI mockup.

Screen description:
<var name="screen_description" type="multiline" value="" label="Screen description" placeholder="Layout, components, content" />

Device: <var name="device" type="option" options="desktop,mobile,tablet,browser window" value="desktop" label="Device" />

UI style: <var name="ui_style" type="option" options="minimal,dense dashboard,playful,enterprise" value="minimal" label="UI style" />

Theme: <var name="theme" type="option" options="light,dark,system" value="light" label="Theme" />

Output a single detailed prompt for a realistic UI mockup image. Specify framing and fidelity.

prompts.name: Iterate Variation
prompts.description: Refine an existing image prompt with controlled changes
prompts.content:
Refine an image-generation prompt.

Current prompt:
<var name="current_prompt" type="multiline" value="" label="Current prompt" placeholder="Existing image prompt" />

Change:
<var name="change" type="multiline" value="" label="Change" placeholder="What to adjust" />

Keep:
<var name="keep" type="multiline" value="" label="Keep" placeholder="What must stay the same" />

Strength: <var name="strength" type="option" options="subtle,moderate,strong" value="moderate" label="Change strength" />

Output only the revised image prompt. Preserve elements listed under keep.
